verses.text: He is shown the chambers over against the separate place, toward the north. Set-apart rooms. God appoints special places within His house.
He is shown the chambers over against the separate place, toward the north. Set-apart rooms. God appoints special places within His house.
He is shown the chambers over against the separate place, toward the north. Set-apart rooms. God appoints special places within His house.
Before the chambers ran a walk; they rose in three stories without the courts' pillars. Distinct design. Each part of the temple has its own form.
Before the chambers ran a walk; they rose in three stories without the courts' pillars. Distinct design. Each part of the temple has its own form.
Before the chambers ran a walk; they rose in three stories without the courts' pillars. Distinct design. Each part of the temple has its own form.
A wall stood before the chambers, entered from the east. Bounded space. God marks the limits of every holy place.
A wall stood before the chambers, entered from the east. Bounded space. God marks the limits of every holy place.
A wall stood before the chambers, entered from the east. Bounded space. God marks the limits of every holy place.
The chambers toward the south were like them, with a doorway at the head of the way. Matching order. Symmetry marks the whole house of God.
The chambers toward the south were like them, with a doorway at the head of the way. Matching order. Symmetry marks the whole house of God.
The chambers toward the south were like them, with a doorway at the head of the way. Matching order. Symmetry marks the whole house of God.

These are the holy chambers where the priests eat the most holy things and lay their garments, not going out in them to the people. Holiness guarded. What is consecrated to God is kept distinct from common use.

These are the holy chambers where the priests eat the most holy things and lay their garments, not going out in them to the people. Holiness guarded. What is consecrated to God is kept distinct from common use.
When the inner house was measured, he measured the east side, five hundred reeds. Vast compass. The whole precinct is taken in by exact measure.
When the inner house was measured, he measured the east side, five hundred reeds. Vast compass. The whole precinct is taken in by exact measure.
When the inner house was measured, he measured the east side, five hundred reeds. Vast compass. The whole precinct is taken in by exact measure.
He measured all four sides; the wall round about served 'to make a separation between the sanctuary and the profane place.' Holiness fenced. God's house is set apart from all that is common.
